title: Floral Pastry Crumble
description: A sweet and crumbly pastry dessert, perfect for snacking. The floral notes add a unique twist to this classic crumble.
instructions: Roll out the floral pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut the pastry into a rectangle, about 9x13 inches.
Mix the crumble, sugar, and melted butter together until well combined.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the crumble is crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Cut into squares or rectangles and serve warm.
